title: Getting to the Appointment
description: Marek helps you get to an appointment by tram, then finish the trip by taxi.
context: You and Marek have an appointment across town. You walk to the stop, take the tram, handle the ticket and your stop, then take a taxi for the final short part.

exchanges.speaker: marek
exchanges.text: Ahoj. O chvíľu máme stretnutie pri stanici. Ako pôjdeme cez mesto?
exchanges.translation: Hi. We have a meeting near the station soon. How will we go across town?
exchanges.prompt: Choose a public-transport option for crossing town.
exchanges.correctFeedback: Pôjdeme električkou. is a clear public-transport choice.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: Marek is asking how to travel across town, so choose the tram.

exchanges.speaker: marek
exchanges.text: Zastávka je blízko, za rohom. Ako pôjdeme na zastávku?
exchanges.translation: The stop is nearby, around the corner. How will we go to the stop?
exchanges.prompt: The stop is close. Choose the walking answer.

choices.translation: I will buy a single ticket.

exchanges.correctFeedback: Ideme pešo. is natural when the stop is close.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: For a nearby stop, use pešo, on foot.

exchanges.speaker: marek
exchanges.text: Sme na zastávke, ale nevidím čas. Čo sa opýtaš?
exchanges.translation: We are at the stop, but I cannot see the time. What will you ask?
exchanges.prompt: Ask when the next tram goes.

choices.translation: When does the next tram go?

exchanges.correctFeedback: Kedy ide ďalšia električka? asks for the next tram time.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: Use Kedy ide ďalšia električka? when you need the tram time.

exchanges.speaker: marek
exchanges.text: Električka prišla. Nie som si istý smerom. Čo sa opýtaš?
exchanges.translation: The tram arrived. I am not sure about the direction. What will you ask?
exchanges.prompt: Ask if this tram goes to the centre.

choices.translation: Does this go to the centre?
When does the next tram go?

exchanges.correctFeedback: Ide toto do centra? is the route-confirmation phrase.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: Use Ide toto do...? when checking where public transport goes.

exchanges.speaker: marek
exchanges.text: Áno, ide do centra. Nemáš predplatnú kartu. Čo kúpiš?
exchanges.translation: Yes, it goes to the centre. You do not have a travel pass. What will you buy?
exchanges.prompt: Buy a single ticket for one ride.

choices.translation: I will buy a single ticket.

exchanges.correctFeedback: Kúpim jednorazový lístok. is right for one ride.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: For one ride, choose jednorazový lístok.

exchanges.speaker: marek
exchanges.text: Nastúpili sme. Teraz treba validovať lístok.
exchanges.translation: We boarded. Now we need to validate the ticket.
exchanges.prompt: Say that you validated the ticket.

choices.translation: I will buy a single ticket.

exchanges.correctFeedback: Validoval som lístok. is the right follow-up after boarding.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: After validating, say Validoval som lístok.

exchanges.speaker: inspector
exchanges.prompt: The ticket inspector asks for tickets. Show your ticket.
exchanges.correctFeedback: Tu je môj lístok. fits a ticket check.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: For Kontrola lístkov, show your ticket.

exchanges.speaker: marek
exchanges.text: Sme blízko centra. Neviem, kde máme vystúpiť.
exchanges.translation: We are near the centre. I do not know where we should get off.
exchanges.prompt: Ask where you should get off.

choices.translation: When does the next tram go?
Does this go to the centre?

exchanges.correctFeedback: Kde mám vystúpiť? is the right question when you are unsure of the stop.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: Use Kde mám vystúpiť? to ask where to get off.

exchanges.speaker: passenger
exchanges.translation: The next stop is yours. The centre.
exchanges.prompt: You are getting off at the next stop.
exchanges.correctFeedback: Tu vystupujem. tells people this is your stop.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: When this is your stop, say Tu vystupujem.

exchanges.speaker: marek
exchanges.translation: We are here. Can I stop here?
exchanges.prompt: Marek says you have arrived. Confirm it is fine to stop here.

choices.translation: When does the next tram go?

exchanges.correctFeedback: Tu je to v poriadku. confirms the stop and closes the journey naturally.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: When you have arrived, say Tu je to v poriadku.

completionMessage: Nice! You got to an appointment by walking to the stop, taking the tram, handling your ticket and stop, then using a taxi for the final part.

questions.marekQuestionSk: Ahoj! Potrebujeme ísť cez mesto. Pôjdeme autobusom alebo električkou?
questions.marekQuestionEn: Hi! We need to go across town. Shall we go by bus or by tram?

questions.marekQuestionSk: Zastávka je blízko. Ako sa tam dostaneme?
questions.marekQuestionEn: The stop is nearby. How will we get there?

questions.marekQuestionSk: Sme na zastávke. Chcem vedieť čas. Čo sa opýtaš?
questions.marekQuestionEn: We are at the stop. I want to know the time. What do you ask?
questions.correctAnswerEn: When does the next tram go?

questions.marekQuestionSk: Prišla električka. Ide toto do centra?
questions.marekQuestionEn: The tram arrived. Does this go to the centre?
questions.correctAnswerEn: Yes, it goes to the centre.

questions.marekQuestionSk: Nemáš predplatnú kartu. Aký lístok kúpiš?
questions.marekQuestionEn: You do not have a travel pass. What ticket will you buy?
questions.correctAnswerEn: I will buy a single ticket.

questions.marekQuestionEn: We boarded. Do not forget to validate the ticket.

questions.marekQuestionSk: Nie som si istý. Kde máme vystúpiť?
questions.marekQuestionEn: I am not sure. Where should we get off?
The next stop is the centre.
We are here. Can I stop here?
